items.title: Trump says US strikes hit Iran in 'honour' of American soldiers killed

items.title: Ten killed as Russian attacks on merchant ships in Black Sea intensify
items.summary: Russian strikes on the Odesa region have killed 28 people in July alone, local authorities say.

items.title: Notorious drug cartel leader Ismael Zambada sentenced to life in US prison
items.summary: Known as "El Mayo", the co-founder the Sinaloa Cartel was also ordered to pay $15bn after he admitted to sending vast amounts of drugs to the US.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 美伊緊張升高　美軍將增派F-16和F-35赴中東
items.summary: 隨著華府與德黑蘭之間的緊張局勢升高，美軍正增派軍機前往中東地區。  美國有線電視新聞網（CNN）報導，一名美國官員表示，美軍計劃從歐洲基地增派F-16和F-35戰機，以及更多空中加油機。  ...…

items.title: 被內鬼出賣！墨76歲大毒梟「五月」判終身監禁 終結40年毒品帝國

items.title: 中國官媒AI影片辱菲律賓人是猴 菲媒貼「習維尼」圖嗆爆反擊！
items.summary: 中菲近年因南海島礁及海域主權問題關係惡化，中國官媒《中國日報》（China Daily）日前發布一段AI生成影片，將菲律賓人畫成猴子，影射其受美日指使才在南海發起「挑釁」，引發輿...…
